projects.title: Schedule Generator App
projects.summary: A desktop application to interact with my schedule generator algorithm. The algorithm is written in Python and generates master and student timetables.
projects.label: Project

projects.title: School Management API
projects.summary: I developed an API to manage an entire school, keeping track of students and staff details while expanding my understanding of Go, API development, and documentation.
projects.label: Project

projects.title: Lines Police CAD
projects.summary: A web service built with Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. I contributed features, bug fixes, and general technical support to a product serving a large user base.
projects.label: Project

projects.title: DayZ Reforger Bot
projects.summary: A large-scale Discord bot focused on parsing game server data, storing it, and presenting valuable information back to users through analytics-driven features.
projects.label: Project

projects.title: XP-System
projects.summary: An early web application project where teachers could assign work and students could earn XP and levels, making the learning process more interactive.
projects.label: Project

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.summary: A minimal personal portfolio focused on clarity, clean presentation, and an easy way to showcase projects, updates, and professional growth.
projects.label: Project

updates.title: 3rd Place at the inaugural Red Team Hackathon
updates.summary: Team Cerberus Gate earned a third-place finish while building a prototype focused on RF signal classification, modulation analysis, and emitter geolocation.
updates.label: Update

updates.title: Joined the BCIT Computing Club as an Executive Member
updates.summary: After helping friends and existing exutives of the BCIT Computing Club, I have officially joined to help represent, and direct events such as reviews sessions, and hackathons.
updates.label: Update
